name: AfterShip Tracking
description: Track packages across 1,300+ global carriers with real-time status and AI-powered delivery dates.
longDescription: AfterShip Tracking & Returns MCP server. Track any shipment in real-time across 1,200+ carriers worldwide. Auto-detect carrier from tracking number. Also provides AfterShip Returns Center demo generation.
author: com.aftership.mcp
examplePrompts: Where is my order? Tracking number is 9400111899223100009383
Generate a returns demo for my store
